metadata.title: Remember Scrollposition
metadata.description: 记住浏览笔记时的滚动位置
metadata.author: daoziz

ast.name: error
ast.source: RememberScrollposition: No access to codemirror instance available, thus cannot retrieve necessary information to save scroll position. Exiting.
ast.target: RememberScrollposition：无法获取 codemirror 实例，因此无法检索必要的信息来保存滚动位置。退出。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: RememberScrollposition: restoreScrollposition was called with invalid parameters.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scroll instantly to saved position upon loading a note
ast.target: 加载笔记时立即滚动到已保存的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure how many days a scroll position should be applied before considered outdated. Leave empty to disable age check.
ast.target: 配置滚动位置在被认为过期之前应该应用多少天。为空则禁用过期检查。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Max age needs to be set to a positive number.
ast.target: 最大年龄需要设置为正数。

regex.source: error("RememberScrollposition: No access to codemirror instance available, thus cannot retrieve necessary information to save scroll position. Exiting.")
regex.target: error("RememberScrollposition: No access to codemirror instance available, thus cannot retrieve necessary information to save scroll position. Exiting.")

regex.source: error(`RememberScrollposition: Could not retrieve editor range to save scroll position for ${s}. Exiting.`)
regex.target: error(`RememberScrollposition: Could not retrieve editor range to save scroll position for ${s}. Exiting.`)

regex.source: description:"Scroll active file to saved position"
regex.target: description:"Scroll active file to saved position"

regex.source: description:"Scroll instantly to saved position upon loading a note"
regex.target: description:"Scroll instantly to saved position upon loading a note"

regex.source: description:"Configure how many days a scroll position should be applied before considered outdated. Leave empty to disable age check."
regex.target: description:"Configure how many days a scroll position should be applied before considered outdated. Leave empty to disable age check."
